name: File Accessed or Downloaded From a Malicious IP
notes: This rule triggers when a file is accessed or downloaded from a malicious IP such as known Command and Control Servers or Malware Servers.
conditions_text: when the event context is Remote to Local, Remote to Remote
when an event matches any of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Object Access Events, BB:CategoryDefinition: Object Download Events
when the event matches XFORCE_IP_CATEGORY(sourceaddress) in ('Malware', 'Botnet Command and Control Server', 'Spam', 'Cryptocurrency Mining') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY File Accessed or Downloaded From a Malicious IP on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event context is Remote to Local, Remote to Remote
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Object Access Events, BB:CategoryDefinition: Object Download Events
AND when the event matches XFORCE_IP_CATEGORY(sourceaddress) in ('Malware', 'Botnet Command and Control Server', 'Spam', 'Cryptocurrency Mining') AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: File Accessed or Downloaded From a Malicious IP
Event description: Detected a file accessed or downloaded from a malicious IP
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Destination IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
